sources.notes: Primary repository README used for generated copy.

facts.value: 🐻 Bear necessities for state management in React
Makes hooks the primary means of consuming state
Doesn't wrap your app in context providers
Can inform components transiently (without causing render)
You can try a live demo and read the docs.
:warning: This readme is written for JavaScript users. If you are a TypeScript user, be sure to check out our TypeScript Usage section.
For more control over re-rendering, you may provide any custom equality function (this example requires the use of createWithEqualityFn).

product.name: zustand
product.oneLiner: 🐻 Bear necessities for state management in React
problems: Developers need a faster way to complete a common workflow.
features: Makes hooks the primary means of consuming state
Doesn't wrap your app in context providers
Can inform components transiently (without causing render)
